prerequisites.value: Creative Armorsmith, Armor Adept, and Craft (armor) 7 ranks, or Creative Weaponsmith, Weapon Adept, and Craft (weapons) 7 ranks; Knowledge (engineering) 7 ranks.

description.value: **Benefit:** You can use Creative Armorsmith or Creative Weaponsmith to add a modification to a weapon or suit of armor that already has a modification. The modification you are adding must be one that you have selected with Armor Adept or Weapon Adept. In addition, others can use armor or weapons with your temporary modifications.
